# onelogin_oidc_app (Resource)

Manages a OneLogin OIDC App.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# OIDC app with typed configuration and multiple redirect URIs
resource "onelogin_oidc_app" "example" {
  name         = "My OIDC App"
  connector_id = 108419

  configuration {
    redirect_uris = [
      "https://app.example.com/callback",
      "https://staging.example.com/callback",
      "http://localhost:3000/callback",
    ]
    login_url                       = "https://app.example.com/login"
    oidc_application_type           = "Web"
    token_endpoint_auth_method      = "BASIC"
    access_token_expiration_minutes = 60
  }

  provisioning = {
    enabled = true
  }

  # Custom parameters
  parameters = [{
    param_key_name          = "email"
    label                   = "Email"
    user_attribute_mappings = "email"
  }]
}

# SSO credentials are computed by the API and stored in state
output "client_id" {
  value     = onelogin_oidc_app.example.sso.client_id
  sensitive = true
}

output "client_secret" {
  value     = onelogin_oidc_app.example.sso.client_secret
  sensitive = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `connector_id` (Number) The connector ID for the app type.
- `name` (String) The name of the app.

### Optional

- `allow_assumed_signin` (Boolean) Whether assumed sign-in is allowed. Defaults to false.
- `brand_id` (Number) The brand ID for the app.
- `configuration` (Block, Optional) OIDC-specific configuration settings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--configuration))
- `description` (String) A description of the app.
- `notes` (String) Notes about the app.
- `parameters` (Attributes Set) Application parameters. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--parameters))
- `policy_id` (Number) The security policy ID.
- `provisioning` (Attributes) Provisioning settings for the app. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--provisioning))
- `role_ids` (Set of Number) Set of role IDs that can access this app.
- `visible` (Boolean) Whether the app is visible to users. Defaults to true.

### Read-Only

- `auth_method` (Number) The authentication method.
- `created_at` (String) When the app was created.
- `icon_url` (String) The URL of the app's icon.
- `id` (Number) The unique identifier of the app.
- `sso` (Attributes) OIDC SSO settings (read-only, populated by the API). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sso))
- `tab_id` (Number) The tab ID.

<a id="nestedblock--configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `configuration`

Optional:

- `access_token_expiration_minutes` (Number) Access token expiration in minutes.
- `login_url` (String) The login URL.
- `oidc_application_type` (String) OIDC application type. Accepts: "Web" (default), "Native".
- `redirect_uris` (Set of String) Set of redirect URIs for the OIDC app. Order does not matter; duplicates are automatically removed.
- `refresh_token_expiration_minutes` (Number) Refresh token expiration in minutes.
- `token_endpoint_auth_method` (String) Token endpoint auth method. Accepts: "BASIC", "POST", "PKCE" (None/PKCE).


<a id="nestedatt--parameters"></a>
### Nested Schema for `parameters`

Required:

- `param_key_name` (String) The parameter key name.

Optional:

- `attributes_transformations` (String) Attribute transformation rules.
- `default_values` (String) Default value for the parameter.
- `include_in_saml_assertion` (Boolean) Whether to include this parameter in the SAML assertion.
- `label` (String) The display label for the parameter.
- `provisioned_entitlements` (Boolean) Whether this parameter uses provisioned entitlements.
- `skip_if_blank` (Boolean) Skip this parameter if value is blank.
- `user_attribute_macros` (String) Macro expression for user attribute.
- `user_attribute_mappings` (String) User attribute to map to this parameter.
- `values` (String) The parameter value.

Read-Only:

- `param_id` (Number) The parameter ID assigned by OneLogin.


<a id="nestedatt--provisioning"></a>
### Nested Schema for `provisioning`

Optional:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether provisioning is enabled.


<a id="nestedatt--sso"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sso`

Read-Only:

- `client_id` (String, Sensitive) The OIDC client ID.
- `client_secret` (String, Sensitive) The OIDC client secret.
